title: Corelib prelude lowering CI on Linux (8 MiB stack, release)

source.subject: fix(ci): run corelib prelude lowering tests on an 8 MiB stack

body:
## Outcome

Run corelib prelude lowering tests on an 8 MiB stack.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`6db12d2`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/6db12d2) — fix(ci): run corelib prelude lowering tests on an 8 MiB stack
